<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\FlareMiddleware; use Closure; use Illuminate\Log\Context\Repository; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Context; use Spatie\FlareClient\FlareMiddleware\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\Report; class AddContext implements FlareMiddleware { public function handle(Report $report, Closure $next) { if (! class_exists(Repository::class)) { return $next($report); } $allContext = Context::all(); if (count($allContext)) { $report->group('laravel_context', $allContext); } return $next($report); } }
